query:
DELETE FROM head_to_head WHERE playerAId = 1 AND playerBId = 2;

INSERT INTO head_to_head (playerAId, playerBId, gamesPlayed, winsA, winsB, totalPointsA, totalPointsB)
SELECT 
  LEAST(gr1.playerId, gr2.playerId) as playerAId,
  GREATEST(gr1.playerId, gr2.playerId) as playerBId,
  COUNT(*) as gamesPlayed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId AND gr1.rank = 1 THEN 1
           WHEN gr1.playerId > gr2.playerId AND gr2.rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as winsA,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId AND gr2.rank = 1 THEN 1
           WHEN gr1.playerId > gr2.playerId AND gr1.rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as winsB,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId THEN gr1.pointsScored
           ELSE gr2.pointsScored END) as totalPointsA,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId THEN gr2.pointsScored
           ELSE gr1.pointsScored END) as totalPointsB
FROM game_results gr1
JOIN game_results gr2 ON gr1.gameId = gr2.gameId AND gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId
GROUP BY LEAST(gr1.playerId, gr2.playerId), GREATEST(gr1.playerId, gr2.playerId);

INSERT INTO head_to_head (playerAId, playerBId, gamesPlayed, winsA, winsB, totalPointsA, totalPointsB)
SELECT 
  LEAST(gr1.playerId, gr2.playerId) as playerAId,
  GREATEST(gr1.playerId, gr2.playerId) as playerBId,
  COUNT(*) as gamesPlayed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId AND gr1.rank = 1 THEN 1
           WHEN gr1.playerId > gr2.playerId AND gr2.rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as winsA,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId AND gr2.rank = 1 THEN 1
           WHEN gr1.playerId > gr2.playerId AND gr1.rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as winsB,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId THEN gr1.pointsScored
           ELSE gr2.pointsScored END) as totalPointsA,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId THEN gr2.pointsScored
           ELSE gr1.pointsScored END) as totalPointsB
FROM game_results gr1
JOIN game_results gr2 ON gr1.gameId = gr2.gameId AND gr1.playerId < gr2.playerId
GROUP BY LEAST(gr1.playerId, gr2.playerId), GREATEST(gr1.playerId, gr2.playerId);
